title: Delete emails and activities created/owned by other monday users
excerpt:
Hey There 
Our emails and activities section gets messy over time. There are alot of meeting-acceptance-Mails or activities with similar content, because the monday user is not able to edit activities of other users and …

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey There
Our emails and activities section gets messy over time. There are alot of meeting-acceptance-Mails or activities with similar content, because the monday user is not able to edit activities of other users and simply copies the content in a new activity.

In each team there is somebody with higher standards for clean activity timelines, but this person can currently not delete emails or activities owned by other users.

Does anybody have a workaround for my problem?
Is there any posibility to delete activities over API? I did not find one so far.
I am currently having the pro monday crm version, so is this feature included in the enterprise version?

Thank you for helping me out.
Kind regards,
Amarin

posts.author: SwenDekker (Swen Dekker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Haven’t personally used it yet, but according to the Developer API Reference you can add and delete timeline items through the API:
Timeline item

Would this help?

posts.author: SwenDekker (Swen Dekker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure if you have seen my previous reply, but in the meantime I have deleted multiple timeline items through the API using the documentation mentioned above:

https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/reference/timeline-item-ea#delete-timeline-item

posts.author: nichcraft (Wahed)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can delete timeline items owned by other users with Pro account.
Query timeline to get item IDs then use delete_timeline_item to remove them.
Full docs are in the Timeline item API reference just in case.
